description_long: This is a compact quadcopter drone with a streamlined, angular body featuring a prominent red top shell and matte black lower chassis. Four rotors are mounted on short, sturdy arms extending from the main body, each with a two-blade propeller. The front of the drone houses two visible camera lenses or sensors, suggesting advanced imaging or navigation capabilities. The landing gear consists of fixed, short legs integrated into the arm structure, providing stability during takeoff and landing. The surface finish is mostly smooth with some subtle textural variation, and the materials appear to be primarily lightweight plastic with possible internal metal reinforcements. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban aerial operations such as surveillance, delivery, or recreational use.
description: A modern quadcopter drone with a red top shell, black body, four rotors, and front-facing cameras. Its compact, angular design is ideal for urban aerial tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual camera lenses, red top shell, and all four rotors clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the low profile, red top, and the fixed landing legs integrated into the arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the red shell, rear sensors, and the symmetrical rotor arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the arm and rotor structure and the fixed landing gear.
